mlkit_advanced_unsupported: Kaore te taputapu o naianei e tautoko i te ML Kit Advanced
permission_reason: Kia tika te mahi o te matapihi taitararoto me te whai korero, whakaaehia nga whakaaetanga e whai ake nei:
engine_whisper_desc: Whakamahia whisper.cpp; i muri i te kitenga i te mutunga o te rerenga korero, ka tuhia te rerenga korero katoa, me te whakaroa mo te 3-5 hēkona.
engine_mlkit_basic_desc: Ma te whakamahi i te ML Kit Basic, e waatea ana ki te nuinga o nga taputapu Android 12+.
engine_mlkit_advanced_desc: Hei whakamahi i te ML Kit Advanced, ka hiahiatia he taputapu e tautoko ana i te AICore/Gemini Nano.
cancel_download_title: Whakaū ki te whakakore i te tikiake
cancel_download_message: Me whakakore te tango i te {tauira}? Ka ngaro te ahunga whakamua o te tikiake.
delete_model_message: E tino hiahia ana koe ki te muku {tauira}? Ma tenei mahi ka tango i te konae tauira kua tikiakehia, a me tango ano e koe i mua i to whakamahi.
model_not_downloaded: Ko te tauira kaore ano kia tikiakehia
translation_desc: Ka hoatu te reo puna ki te ML Kit me te Whisper ina whakahohea te whakamaoritanga.
translation_enabled_desc: Whakaatuhia te puna me nga kupu hauraro kua whakamaoritia
translation_disabled_desc: Whakaatuhia nga kupu hauraro puna anake
error_missing_projection: Kua ngaro te hua whakamanatanga MediaProjection.
status_service_failed: I rahua te ratonga taitararoto ora.
error_projection_token: Kaore e taea te whiwhi tohu MediaProjection.
error_no_overlay: Ko te whakakore i etahi atu tono kaore ano kia whakaaetia.
error_no_record: Kaore i whakaaetia te whakaaetanga tuhi.
error_no_notification: Kaore i whakaaetia te whakaaetanga whakamohiotanga.
error_checksum_failed: I rahua te whakamana tauira: SHA-1 o {tauira} karekau e taurite ki te puranga whaimana.
error_accessibility_service_unavailable: Kaore i te hono te Ratonga Whakaaetanga Tapanga. Tatari mo te wa ka ngana ano.
error_model_download_requires_network: Ko te tauira korero kaore ano kia tikiakehia. Tūhono ki te ipurangi ka ngana anō.
error_sha1_mismatch: SHA-1 hē, e tumanakohia ana, e tika ana
mlkit_downloading: Kei te tikiake tonu te tauira {engine}.
mlkit_unsupported: Kaore a {engine} e tautoko i tenei taputapu, reo ranei.
mlkit_status_unavailable: Karekau te mana o {engine} i te waatea: {status}
status_running: Kei te haere tonu nga kupu hauraro mo te wa-tūturu
error_engine_unsupported_lang: Karekau a {engine} e tautoko i te reo: {tag}
error_translate_unsupported_lang: Ko te Whakamaori ML Kit kaore i te tautoko i te reo: {tag}
error_whisper_unsupported_lang: Karekau te muhumuhu e tautoko i te reo: {tag}
error_translate_source_unsupported: Kaore a ML Kit e tautoko i te reo puna: {tag1} ({tag2})
error_translate_target_unsupported: Kāore a ML Kit i te tautoko i te reo i whäia: {tag1} ({tag2})
